sentences: Professionals who would like to learn to use CSS for enhancing the look of webpages
A course that builds on the architecture of CSS and provides learners with a toolset for creating custom stylesheets and enhancing the look of standard webpages.
Prerequisites required: CSS Architecture

widgetData.source_sentence: Intro to React: Props, State, & Conditional Rendering
sentences: A course that establishes foundational knowledge of building interactive websites with React framework, focused on passing data between and conditionally rendering components
Professionals who would like to build front end applications using React.
Prerequisites required: Intro to React: JSX & Components
An introduction to software testing and types of testing using Node.js.
Professionals who would like to learn the core concepts of software testing using Node.js
Prerequisites required: Authentication Node.js
Prerequisites required: Backend: Python
Professionals who would like to learn the core concepts of relational databases.
An introduction to relational databases and how relational databases can help shape your production-ready application.
Professionals some Python experience who would like to expand their skill set to time series modeling
Prerequisites required: Intro to Time Series Analysis
Learn how to apply seasonal analysis and ARIMA models and how to decompose and identify seasonal and non-seasonal factors all while learning the nuances of building sophisticated time series models.
